Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Now that your aircraft have reached their loitering point to the northeast of the enemy contacts, let's use their AS-13 missiles to attack and sink both targets.

Hit the middle mouse button (MMB) to select the Formation Leader, then click the AS-13 button on the bottom bar, and then right click on one of the enemy contacts. The aircraft will align to the target and launch one of their missiles once within the firing arc.

Note that you can hold Shift to queue up attack orders for aircraft across several targets at once. After your missiles hit the first contact, order your aircraft to hit the second target with AS-13 missiles.
